# Allowlist for check-test-tags.
#
# Entries excuse a test or build tag from the reachability check.
#   tag:NAME              a build tag deliberately enabled by no CI job (manual
#                         or local-only suite); the gated tests run only when a
#                         developer opts in with -tags NAME and the required setup.
#   <pkg-dir>:<TestName>  a single test, keyed by package directory and function
#                         name, for example internal/foo:TestBar.
#
# Keep this list short and justified; prefer fixing the tag or test name.

# Private registry tests need a real Terraform registry URL and token
# (PRIVATE_REGISTRY_URL / PRIVATE_REGISTRY_TOKEN) that CI does not provide, so
# they are gated behind a tag that no job enables and skip without those vars.
tag:private_registry
